description: Style NoteThis sneaker is a part of Fusion sneakers line from skechers, equipped with comfy features and a stylish upper. Style this with your off-duty staples to give them a new-season twist.Product DetailsBlack round toed synthetic and mesh upper with nubuck overlaysHas perforations on the synthetic upper with central lace-upsHas a padded inner and tongueFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with terraced lugs all overMaterial and CareLeather, mesh, syntheticClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
